private_opportunities.title: McDonald's Plans to Open 8,000 Restaurants by End of 2027 and ...
private_opportunities.snippet:
# McDonald’s Plans to Open 8,000 Restaurants by End of 2027 and Shake Up Menu

Published

Jan 20, 2026 at 11:12 AM EST

updated

Jan 21, 2026 at 09:37 AM EST

Amanda Greenwood

Associate News Editor

McDonalds is planning to complete its global expansion of more than 8,000 new restaurants across 50,000 locations by 2027, and this year, also plans to change its pricing structure and menu offerings.

## What Changes Is McDonald’s Planning?

### Global Expansion

McDonald’s plans to reach 50,000 locations worldwide by the end of 2027, including the opening of more than 8,000 new restaurants (about 900 in the U.S.), an initiative that began in 2024. The expansion is designed to position the company for value‑focused consumers and to intensify competition in high‑growth international markets. [...] Correction 1/21/26, 9:36 a.m. ET: This article was corrected to state that McDonald's plans to complete its global expansion by the end of 2027 and to clarify its new pricing guidelines.

Google Preferred Source Banner

## Related Podcasts

## Top Stories

Democrats’ Pipe Dream of Turning Texas Blue Takes Step Forward
The 5 Ways Khamenei’s Iran Survival Plan Haunts Trump
The Fight for the Post-Trump Republican Party Starts in Texas
Nicole M. Amor’s Husband Recalls Final Call With Killed US Soldier
US Launches Military Action In Ecuador: What To Know
How Food Is Replacing Pills as Medicine at the Top US Hospitals

## Trending [...] ### New Menu Changes

Some popular CosMc's offerings are being introduced to the menu after the experimental, drinks-forward shops shuttered in June 2025. According to McDonald’s, the Toasted Vanilla Frappé, Strawberry Watermelon Refresher, Sprite Lunar Splash, Popping Tropic Refresher, and a Creaming Vanilla Cold Brew will now be available at 500 McDonald's locations.

New sandwich options and chicken items are likely to be part of future menu updates, as customer demand for chicken products now matches that for beef items, Mashed reported.

The restaurant said its “Better Burger Initiative,” which focuses on improving burger preparation, using fresher ingredients, and implementing stricter food-handling standards, will also revolutionize the quality of its burgers.

This marked the beginning of a significant growth phase for the business. [...] More from The Sun

# Popular fast food chain announces plans to open 25 new locations creating 1.7k jobs in major boost to Irish economy

An image collage containing 3 images, Image 1 shows A modern McDonald's restaurant with a drive-thru, wooden and dark gray siding, and a large golden arches logo, Image 2 shows Four people, two men and two women, pose outside a McDonald's restaurant, Image 3 shows Three men in suits standing in front of a McDonald's restaurant

MCDONALD’S has announced plans to open 25 new restaurants in Ireland.

In 2027, the fast food restaurant chain will celebrate its 50-year milestone birthday – and to celebrate, it has announced a major investment.

### Sign up for The Irish Sun newsletter

### Thank you!

Please provide a valid email. [...] “We plan that our 50th anniversary in Ireland next year will coincide with the opening of our 100th restaurant in Ireland.”

Alongside the opening of the new restaurants, the company will also invest in existing restaurants.

Minister of State at the Department of Rural and Community Development and the Gaeltacht and T.D. for Cork South-Central, Jerry Buttimer said: “Today’s announcement from McDonald’s is a strong endorsement of the value of long-term investment in Ireland’s communities, delivering tangible benefits for the economy through the creation of 1,750 new local jobs over the next five years.

private_opportunities.title: McDonald's plans massive overhaul with major changes to ...
private_opportunities.snippet:
McDonald’s has kicked off 2026 with a shake-up plan to bring in nostalgia, technology and boost customer loyalty while adapting to changing consumer habits while focusing on value leadership and consistency.

According to the company, the key changes in the plan include new restaurant openings, menu updates and expanded digital tools.

Growth will also focus on high-traffic and emerging markets, while existing locations continue to be upgraded to meet new operational standards.

PIZZA USED TO BE CHEAP, FILLING AND EVERYWHERE — NOW AMERICANS ARE WALKING AWAY FROM IT

Car driving my a McDonald's.

An exterior view of a McDonald's fast food restaurant on May 24, 2024. (Paul Weaver/SOPA Images/LightRocket / Getty Images) [...] The 'McValue' menu debuted Jan. 7. (McDonald's)

The franchised model will remain in place, and individual owners will continue to set prices based on their local market conditions and maintain the focus on value leadership and consistency.

Otherwise, the McDonald’s menu will see new drink options tested through its past CosMc’s concept and so, CosMc's-inspired beverages.

The company is also expanding its chicken lineup with new wraps and upgraded sandwiches.

Burger quality is also getting attention, with the Better Burger Initiative focusing on improved preparation techniques, fresher ingredients and tighter food-handling standards.

FAST-FOOD RESTAURANTS USING NEW TECHNOLOGY TO RESHAPE HOW CUSTOMERS PLACE ORDERS

Split image of McNuggets and man opening wallet [...] Split image of McNuggets and man opening wallet

McDonald's is working to improve food quality and provide faster, more affordable service in 2026. (Getty Images / iStock)

McDonald’s maintains its card and tap-to-pay systems, while cash transactions will be rounded up or down as pennies are phased out.

Restaurants may ask customers to use exact change or cashless payment options like credit/debit or the App, where they can unlock a variety of national and local deals, the company said.

In countries where similar currency changes have taken place, local businesses have followed similar rounding practices.

The McDonald’s Rewards program will also be expanded with more personalized deals, smoother mobile ordering and additional ways to earn points.
private_opportunities.bid_fit_summary: McDonald's is planning a major overhaul that includes new restaurant openings and expanded digital tools, which presents a significant opportunity for PARTTEAM & OEMKIOSKS to supply self-ordering kiosks and digital signage solutions. executive_takeaway: The biggest opportunity this week lies in the private sector with McDonald's significant expansion plans. Leadership should prioritize engaging with McDonald's procurement teams to position PARTTEAM's self-ordering kiosks and digital signage solutions as essential components of their new and overhauled restaurant locations. This aligns with our strategic objective to grow in the QSR and food service market. Immediate action is recommended to capitalize on this high-impact opportunity.
